subcodes.title: Words to E.J. Rosenberg et al, spoken around Feb. 1901
subcodes.first_line: In this story of our Lord Jesus the Sea of Tiberias represents the Ocean of Creation - the two shores represent earthly truth and spiritual truth.
subcodes.subjects: @limits of the intellect, @symbolism, @literal interpretation, @four methods of acquiring knowledge, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
